tasks.subject: Task 1: Design tokens + shared components in BASE_STYLE
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace the current ad-hoc palette in `BASE_STYLE` with the sky/slate tokens from catalogo-mayorista-b2b, plus shared utility classes (`.card`, `.desktop-only`, `.mobile-only`) needed by later mobile-card tasks.

**Files:**
- Modify: `routes_app.py:99-201` (BASE_STYLE)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] CSS variables updated to new palette (--blue: #0284C7, --blue-dark: #0369A1, --accent: #0EA5E9, --bg: #F8FAFC, --text: #334155, --text-muted: #64748B, --dark: #0F172A, --border: #D8EBF2, --light: #E8F4F8)
- [ ] Inter font imported and applied
- [ ] Cards/forms use 16px radius, buttons use 12px radius, badges gain a subtle border
- [ ] New `.card`, `.desktop-only`, `.mobile-only` utility classes added
- [ ] All 128 existing pytest tests still pass (no logic touched)
- [ ] Manual check: Home page loads with new palette, no visual breakage

**Verify:** `pytest -q` → 128 passed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["routes_app.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["palette variables updated", "Inter font applied", "card/button radii updated", "utility classes added", "tests pass", "manual visual check"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Bottom nav bar for mobile
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a fixed bottom tab bar (5 destinations, icons + labels) that replaces the top pill nav below 768px, with JS to highlight the current page.

**Files:**
- Modify: `routes_app.py` (BASE_STYLE nav CSS, NAV_LINKS)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Desktop (>=768px): existing top pill nav unchanged
- [ ] Mobile (<768px): top nav hidden, fixed bottom bar shown with 5 emoji icons + labels
- [ ] Bottom bar highlights the current page via JS pathname matching
- [ ] body gets bottom padding on mobile so content isn't hidden behind the fixed bar
- [ ] Manual check at ~375px width: bottom bar visible and correctly highlights each of the 5 pages

**Verify:** Manual browser check at 375px and 1280px widths on Home page

```json:metadata
{"files": ["routes_app.py"], "verifyCommand": "manual browser check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["desktop nav unchanged", "mobile shows bottom bar", "active page highlighted", "body padding added"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: CRM search backend (q parameter)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add free-text search (negocio/direccion/telefono) to the CRM leads query functions, combinable with existing filters.

**Files:**
- Modify: `routes_db.py:385-447` (`_crm_filters_clause`, `get_crm_leads`, `count_crm_leads`, `get_crm_leads_all`)
- Test: `tests/test_routes_db.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `q` param does partial, case-insensitive match against negocio, direccion, or telefono
- [ ] Combines with categoria/estado/min_reviews/min_rating via AND
- [ ] Empty/no match returns empty list, not an error
- [ ] Parameterized query (no string concatenation of user input into SQL)
- [ ] All new tests pass, all 128 existing tests still pass

**Verify:** `pytest tests/test_routes_db.py -v` → all pass including new search tests

```json:metadata
{"files": ["routes_db.py", "tests/test_routes_db.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/test_routes_db.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["matches negocio", "matches direccion", "matches telefono", "combines with other filters", "no match returns empty", "parameterized query"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: CRM page - search bar, collapsible filters, mobile cards
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire the new search param into the CRM route/template, collapse filters behind a toggle on mobile, and render each lead as a card instead of a table row below 768px.

**Files:**
- Modify: `routes_app.py` (`crm()`, `exportar_crm_csv()`, `PAGE_CRM`)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Search input at top of CRM page, value round-trips through querystring
- [ ] `q` passed through to pager links and CSV export link
- [ ] Filters (categoria/estado/reviews/rating) collapse behind "Filtros" button on mobile, always visible on desktop
- [ ] Desktop keeps the existing table; mobile renders `.mobile-cards` list instead (both rendered from the same Jinja loop, toggled via CSS)
- [ ] Manual check: search + filters work, mobile shows cards, desktop shows table

**Verify:** Manual browser check at 375px and 1280px; `pytest -q` still 128+ passed (route logic unchanged besides q passthrough)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["routes_app.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest -q && manual browser check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["search input works", "q in pager/export links", "filters collapse on mobile", "table on desktop, cards on mobile"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Mapa page - collapsible filtros + bottom sheet detail
tasks.description:
**Goal:** On mobile, collapse the lotes-filter checklist behind a toggle, and turn the marker-detail panel into a bottom sheet that slides up over the full-width map instead of a fixed side panel.

**Files:**
- Modify: `routes_app.py` (`PAGE_MAPA`)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Desktop: map + side panel layout unchanged
- [ ] Mobile: map is full-width, lotes filter list collapses behind a "Filtros de lotes" button
- [ ] Mobile: tapping a marker slides the detail panel up from the bottom as an overlay (not pushing content)
- [ ] Panel has a way to close (handle/close control) without navigating away
- [ ] Manual check at 375px: tap marker, sheet slides up with correct lead info, closes correctly

**Verify:** Manual browser check at 375px and 1280px on the Mapa page

```json:metadata
{"files": ["routes_app.py"], "verifyCommand": "manual browser check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["desktop unchanged", "mobile filtros collapse", "bottom sheet slides up on marker tap", "sheet closable"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Historial + Fallidos mobile card layout
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Apply the same table→cards mobile conversion used in CRM to the two remaining table-based pages.

**Files:**
- Modify: `routes_app.py` (`PAGE_HISTORIAL`, `PAGE_FALLIDOS`)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Both pages keep their existing desktop table unchanged
- [ ] Both pages render a `.mobile-cards` list below 768px, from the same Jinja loop
- [ ] Empty states ("Todavia no generaste ningun lote." / "Ninguno por ahora.") shown correctly in both layouts
- [ ] Manual check at 375px and 1280px on both pages

**Verify:** Manual browser check at 375px and 1280px on Historial and Fallidos pages

```json:metadata
{"files": ["routes_app.py"], "verifyCommand": "manual browser check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["desktop tables unchanged", "mobile cards render", "empty states correct on both pages"]}
```
